name: multi-grep
description: Search for multiple patterns across files or in a single file, collapsing 30+ grep calls into 1 step.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: File path or directory to search in

parameters.name: patterns
parameters.description: Space-separated grep patterns to search for

parameters.name: --include
parameters.description: File glob pattern to include (directory mode only, e.g. *.py)

parameters.name: --context
parameters.description: Show N lines of context around each match

examples.expected: Matches with 2 lines of context around each hit

cost_saving_rationale: Searches for multiple patterns in one pass, saving 1 step per extra pattern vs sequential grep calls.
